— Capabilities

06 disciplines · One practice

From brief
to handover.

We integrate civil, energy, water, transit, geotechnical and resilience engineering under one roof — so programs of national consequence get a single accountable team.

N° 01

Bridges · Viaducts · Buildings

Civil & Structural

Long-span bridges, complex viaducts, seismic retrofits and high-rise structural systems delivered from concept through construction supervision.

  • Cable-stay & extradosed bridges
  • Pre-cast segmental viaducts
  • Seismic isolation systems
  • Forensic structural review
N° 02

Solar · Transmission · Storage

Energy & Grid

Utility-scale renewables, grid interconnection, substation engineering and BESS integration for IPPs and sovereign utilities.

  • PV plants up to 1 GW
  • 400 kV transmission corridors
  • GIS / AIS substations
  • Battery storage integration
N° 03

Desalination · Treatment · Networks

Water & Wastewater

Coastal desalination, municipal treatment, conveyance and smart-network engineering — designed for the climate realities of the next century.

  • SWRO desalination plants
  • Tertiary treatment & reuse
  • Bulk water conveyance
  • SCADA & leak detection
N° 04

Metros · Highways · Ports

Transit & Mobility

Metro systems, intercity expressways, freight corridors, ports and intermodal terminals delivered as integrated mobility programs.

  • Elevated & underground metro
  • DBFOT highway packages
  • Port master planning
  • Multimodal terminals
N° 05

Ground · Foundations · Tunnels

Geotechnical

Site investigation, deep foundations, ground improvement and tunnel design — the discipline that decides whether infrastructure lasts.

  • TBM & NATM tunnels
  • Marine pile design
  • Slope stabilisation
  • Liquefaction mitigation
N° 06

Coastal · Flood · Carbon

Climate & Resilience

Resilience engineering for coastal, flood and seismic risk — and embodied-carbon strategy for low-emission infrastructure.

  • Coastal protection works
  • Urban flood masterplans
  • Embodied carbon audits
  • Climate stress-testing

— Engagement

How we work.

01

Brief & feasibility

Six weeks. We model the program from first principles before quoting a fee.

02

Concept & engineering

Three to nine months of integrated design across civil, energy or transit disciplines.

03

Detailed design

Tender-grade documentation, BIM coordination and constructability review.

04

Construction supervision

Senior engineers resident on site through the full build-out and commissioning.

Have a brief that fits one of these capabilities? Start with a 30-minute conversation.

Book a call

Boddam Infra · Est. 2009

Build what
outlasts us.

An engineering practice shaping bridges, energy, water and transit infrastructure across three continents.
